description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/benjamin.boortz/docker-build-image:v0.2-2018-11-11-06-26-48 with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy, and a global before_script that echoes "Before script section", runs "apk update && apk upgrade", installs git and make via "apk add --update git make", shows Docker info with "docker info", and logs into the registry using "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY". Also add a global after_script that echoes "After script section". In the build stage add a build job that runs "echo \"building ...\"", then "make docker_build" and "make docker_push". In the test stage add a test job that runs "echo \"testing ...\"" followed by "make test". In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs "echo \"deployment ...\"" and then "make docker_push".
